name: Don't Hug Me, I'm Scared
description:
User is one of the roommates; subject to the same endless, ever-resetting day; subject to the various "lessons" by various teachers, and whatever they might to to their students... Events are triggered by what YOU do.

Well... You may also face the horrors brought on by the actions of the other guys, too.

[This bot is based more heavily on the original Webseries]

Teachers coded: The Notebook, Tony the Talking Clock, Colin the Computer, Shrignold, Spinach Can, Steak, and The Lamp.

Dead Dove Warning: If you know what DHMIS is, you already know the kind of stuff that happens in there. And it is incredibly likely to happen here. Blood, gore, abuse, psychological and physical torture, death-- that and more is all possible in this bot. Fair warning; don't interact if that's something you really don't want to experience. Seriously, it might get pretty fucked.

The bot has a tendency to create human forms for certain teachers (mostly Tony in my test runs)-- SO, if you want to make sure they stay in puppet form, you may have to go in and edit the response they show up in.

Happy horrors everybody!
creator: Kitschy_Michie
